# Issue: Create README for OctoAcme Project Management Docs with Process Summary and Links

## Overview
This issue requests the creation of a README file for the OctoAcme Project Management documentation suite. The README will serve as a central entry point, providing a brief summary of the project management processes and links to all individual process documents.

## Details

**Which process document do you want to update?**
- New document (OctoAcme Project Management Docs README)

**Summary of New Content**
Create a comprehensive README file for the docs/ directory that serves as a hub for all OctoAcme project management documentation. The README should include:
- Brief overview of OctoAcme's project management approach and core principles
- Table of contents with links to all process documents
- Quick reference guide for selecting the right process doc for different scenarios
- High-level project lifecycle overview

**Why is this update needed?**
- Provides a single entry point for team members seeking project management guidance
- Improves discoverability of existing process documents
- Reduces onboarding time for new team members
- Creates a cohesive narrative around OctoAcme's project management methodology
- Aligns with the purpose of this Copilot Space to centralize and standardize project management knowledge

**Suggested Content**
The README should include links to:
- octoacme-project-management-overview.md
- octoacme-project-initiation.md
- octoacme-project-planning.md
- octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md
- octoacme-risks-and-communication.md
- octoacme-release-and-deployment.md
- octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md
- octoacme-roles-and-personas.md

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [x] Content aligns with existing process docs
- [x] Update improves clarity or closes a documented gap
- [x] Proposed content has been reviewed with stakeholders (if needed)
